name: Chikankari Cotton Kurta – Ivory
description: Hand-embroidered chikankari work on breathable cotton. Relaxed straight fit, great for everyday wear.

name: Ajrakh Block Print Kurta – Indigo
description: Traditional Ajrakh block prints in deep indigo on soft cotton. Mandarin collar with side slits.

name: Mustard Bagh Print Straight Kurta
description: Sunny mustard kurta with hand block bagh prints. Straight cut, three-quarter sleeves.

name: Maroon Embroidered A-Line Kurta
description: Thread-embroidered yoke on a flowy A-line silhouette in rich maroon. Dressy enough for festive wear.

name: Bandhani Silk Dupatta – Fuchsia Pink
description: Traditional bandhani tie-dye on pure silk with a contrast gota border. Adds a festive pop to any outfit.

name: Chiffon Zari Border Dupatta – Gold
description: Lightweight chiffon dupatta with a delicate gold zari border. Easy to drape for daily or festive wear.

name: Phulkari Cotton Dupatta – Multicolor
description: Punjabi phulkari embroidery in vibrant multicolor threadwork on a soft cotton base.

name: Banarasi Silk Saree – Deep Red
description: Classic Banarasi weave in deep red with gold zari motifs. Comes with a matching unstitched blouse piece.

name: Handloom Linen Saree – Sand Beige
description: Breathable handloom linen saree in sand beige with a subtle woven border. Ideal for daytime events.

name: Georgette Printed Saree – Teal
description: Flowy georgette saree with an all-over floral print in teal. Pairs with a ready-to-wear blouse.

name: Oxidised Silver Jhumka Earrings
description: Traditional oxidised silver jhumkas with a bell-shaped drop. Lightweight enough for all-day wear.

name: Kundan Choker Necklace Set
description: Kundan-studded choker with matching earrings. A statement piece for festive and wedding looks.
